---
title: 'Growing Restless'
date: '2015-09-07T04:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9219892875478246885'
blogger_filename: '/2015/09/growing-restless.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<div style="text-align: left;"><br /><h4>Restless of being Weary</h4><br /><br /></div><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/genesis/passage.aspx?q=genesis+25:19-34" target="_blank">Jacob and Esau</a> are the&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twin#Fraternal_.28sororal.3B_dizygotic.29_twins" target="_blank">fraternal twin</a> sons of Isaac. Esau is a whole 30 seconds older than Jacob, being exposed to air first. Jacob comes holding onto his heal.<br /><br /><ul><li>Esau is born reddish and hairy. Esau ends up becoming a hunter and warrior personality (Modern Translation: Jock and/or Soldier personality).&nbsp;</li></ul><ul><li>Jacob ends up being "a peaceful man living in tents" (Modern Translation: Geek and/or Artist personality) and also becomes quite a good chef.</li></ul><br />Isaac is Abraham's son of promise. Through prophecy, and a whole lot of ignorance and deception, Jacob ends up with the blessing that belonged to his older brother by birth right. After he gets the Blessing, he walks into the annals of history to change his name to Israel. He then fathers a nation of the same name, The Israelites.<br /><br />Esau, saddened at his loss, comes to his father. Can I get a blessing too Dad? Just a little one?<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/genesis/27-40.html" target="_blank">Genesis 27:40 KJV</a><br /><br />And by thy sword shalt thou live , and shalt serve thy brother; and it shall come to pass when thou shalt have the <b>dominion </b>, that thou shalt break his yoke from off thy neck.</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><a href="http://biblehub.com/genesis/27-40.htm" target="_blank">New International Version</a>&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br />"You will live by the sword and you will serve your brother. But when you grow <b>restless</b>, you will throw his yoke from off your neck."</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=genesis+27%3A40&amp;t=nas" target="_blank">NASB&nbsp;</a></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">"By your&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=02719" style="background-color: white; color: #3380cc; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">sword</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;you shall&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=02421" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">live</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">, And your&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=0251" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">brother</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;you shall&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=05647" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">serve</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;; But it shall&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=01961" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">come</a>&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">about&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=03512" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">when</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;you&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=07300" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">become</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=07300" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;"><b>restless</b></a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">, That you will&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=06561" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">break</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;his&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=05923" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">yoke</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;from your&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=nas&amp;sn=06677" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">neck</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">."</span>&nbsp;</blockquote><br />This word Restless Defined:<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;"><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/ruwd.html" target="_blank">The KJV Old Testament Hebrew Lexicon: "Ruwd"&nbsp;</a></b></span><br /><table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="320"><table style="border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr style="height: 20px;"><td nowrap="" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top"><b>Strong's Number:</b>&nbsp;&nbsp; 07300</td><td align="center" nowrap="" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="120">&nbsp;<b></b><b>&nbsp;</b></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top"><table style="border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b>Original Word</b></td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b>Word Origin</b></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%"><span class="hebrew" style="font-family: BSTHebrew; font-size: 24px;">dwr</span></td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%">a primitive root</td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b>Transliterated Word</b></td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/ruwd.html#Legend" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">TDNT</a>&nbsp;Entry</b></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%">Ruwd</td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%">TWOT - 2129</td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b>Phonetic Spelling</b></td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" width="50%"><b>Parts of Speech</b></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%"><i>rood</i>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span id="LexiconAudio" url="http://www.biblestudytools.com/resource/flash/player-button.swf?audio=http://ht.salemweb.net/bst/lexicons/hebrew-mp3/7300h.mp3"></span>&nbsp;&nbsp;</td><td style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" valign="top" width="50%">Verb</td></tr></tbody></table></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Definition</b></td></tr><tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1"><ol><li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to wander restlessly, roam<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a"><li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Qal) to roam</li><li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Hiphil) to be restless, <b>show restlessness</b></li></ol></li></ol></ol></td></tr></tbody></table></td></tr></tbody></table></blockquote><div style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; padding: 0px;"></div><br /><br /><h4>So what lessons can we learn from Esau?</h4><br />Have you ever been the blessed one, but you forfeited your rights because of short sighted wants and desires? You ended up becoming a servant of sin, sickness, demons, fear, addiction, etc? Maybe it wasn't that bad, maybe you just forfeited the best, for good enough.<br /><br />When you get restless, you can throw off those chains. Through Jesus, all people can be blessed now, not just the few and the chosen.<br /><br />But it's not going to just fall on you. Jesus paid the price, but he's already done everything. It's now up to you. When you grow restless, tired of not having enough, tired of not being enough, tired of living in defeat... than you can throw off the chains of servitude and find freedom.<br /><br />It will not be easy, or comfortable. Imagine, for a moment. That you are bound in chains, and yoked to pull a a wagon behind you. Like a human mule. Imagine the force it would take to not just remove... but BREAK the chains and yoke off of you like an explosion.<br /><br />Dave Ramsey calls this <a href="http://www.daveramsey.com/blog/gazelle-intensity-do-you-have-it/" target="_blank">Gazelle Intensity</a>.<br /><br />Restless is a Verb, and action. It's not a feeling, it's a demonstrated motion of activity. You aren't restless when you feel tired or irritated. You are restless when you become motivated, and that motivation is apparent in your actions.<br /><br />No one around you will doubt or wonder if you have become restless. It will be like an explosion of new and different activity. You have to live like no-one else, so that you can live like no-one else.<br /><br />When you are restless... we'll all know. Until then, we'll just watch to see when it hits.<br /><br /><h4>Your Turn:</h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Is there anything that has been holding you back for so long, it's about time you grew restless about it?&nbsp;</b></blockquote><b><br /></b><h4><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>, Etc...</b></h4><b><br /></b><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Tweet These:</b><br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><br /><hr color="black" noshade="" /><br /><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">New Here? Start HERE</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a></span></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank">Insight In Your Inbox: Sign up for email delivery here</a>.&nbsp;</li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</a>, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</li></ul></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></a></div><div><br /><br /><b>Other Hobby Sties by Darrell:</b><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>End Times Prophecy Study</li></ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>Fiction and Flash Fiction Practice</li></ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a></li><ul><li>Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy Fort Worth Texas. Reviews</li></ul></ul></div>
